falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a confirmed upward trend rather than uncertainty.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the bottom pattern similarity and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The market makes a new 6-month low within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new 6-month low would indicate a confirmed bearish trend, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict and HOLD signal by showing clear downward momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
